response.global_summary: The video is a promotional clip featuring the virtual character "Mizuyasu" with a visual title card "Step Into Dreams". It contains background music throughout, but there are no sung vocals. Therefore, no song title, artist, or lyrics are associated with this video segment.

scenes.description: The entire video features a static image of the virtual character "Mizuyasu" with the text "Step Into Dreams" prominently displayed. Background music plays, but there are no vocals.
